mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_trace (trace_id, user_id, conversation_id, user_input, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{traceId}, #{userId}, #{conversationId}, #{userInput}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_trace WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_trace SET intent = #{intent}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, final_answer = #{finalAnswer}, status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, latency_ms = #{latencyMs}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE trace_id = #{traceId}
